findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: developer-tools__get_github_repo, ecommerce-intelligence__analyze_shopify_store, ecommerce-intelligence__get_store_products, github__get_repo_stats, google-maps__validate_emails, job-market__company_reviews, news__get_ap_news, news__get_bbc_news, news__get_npr_news, news__get_hacker_news, news__search_google_news, playwright__get_html, playwright__extract_table, premium-data__search_amazon_products, premium-data__compare_product_prices, real-estate__search_redfin_properties, real-estate__get_property_details, reddit__search_reddit, reddit__get_subreddit, redfin__get_property_details, regulatory-filings__get_form_4_insider_trades, regulatory-filings__get_form_d_private_funding, regulatory-filings__get_schedule_13d_activist, regulatory-filings__get_earnings_calendar, review-intelligence__trustpilot_reviews, review-intelligence__g2_reviews, review-intelligence__yelp_reviews, sales-intelligence__enrich_lead_list, seo-web-analysis__crawl_website, travel__search_tripadvisor, web-scraping__crawl_website, web-scraping__google_search · Private data: domain-intelligence__dns_lookup, google-maps__generate_leads, legal__search_court_records, premium-data__lookup_business_registration, regulatory-filings__get_form_d_private_funding, sales-intelligence__find_company_emails, sales-intelligence__aggregate_company_profile, sales-intelligence__find_b2b_leads, sales-intelligence__enrich_lead_list, seo-web-analysis__check_dns · Public sink: google-maps__validate_emails, playwright__fill_form, regulatory-filings__get_form_4_insider_trades, regulatory-filings__get_form_d_private_funding, regulatory-filings__get_schedule_13d_activist, regulatory-filings__get_earnings_calendar, sales-intelligence__find_company_emails, sales-intelligence__enrich_company · Destructive: developer-tools__get_github_repo, regulatory-filings__get_form_13f_holdings, sales-intelligence__detect_tech_stack.

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
